golden_rule: No profile dependency, only profile collaboration.

profile_model.name: Layered Autonomous Profiles Architecture
profile_model.contract: Equinox is the host-system/admin profile. Every other visible profile is a self-contained mini OS with Kernel, Runtime, Experience and Intelligence layers. Retired aliases may redirect to a merged profile for compatibility.
profile_model.composition: Profiles can collaborate through declared capabilities, but no profile may silently load another profile's full stack.
profile_model.equinox_role: Equinox is the normal host/admin OS surface: it uses the primary HOME, direct package managers and unrestricted system resources. It may manage other mini OS profiles without silently loading their full stacks.

isolation_policy.activation: SevenOS activates packages per profile through runtime state, service policy, app shims and systemd slices
isolation_policy.rule: Installed does not mean active. No profile dependency, only profile collaboration.

equinox.title: Equinox Balance
equinox.purpose: The normal SevenOS host/admin environment for daily use, package management, system settings, shared resources and guided control of the isolated mini OS profiles.

runtime: core desktop services
files, settings, terminal and browser readiness
safe common tools

anti_nuisance: no heavy dev stack by default
no security scans by default
no cloud daemons by default
no gaming overlays by default
no foreign OS VM by default

independence.composition_policy: may borrow light capabilities only after explicit user action or SevenAI confirmation

baobab.title: Baobab Cultural OS
baobab.domain: African heritage, oral memory, language, learning and transmission
baobab.purpose: A living African cultural mini OS: digital village, heritage library, language hub, oral memory, story engine, soundscape, fashion bridge, food memory, wisdom center and offline-first community archive. Baobab does not own general documents, OCR or map/GIS workflows; Atlas owns those.

kernel: quiet resource use for reading and narration
foreground priority for reading, narration and cultural study
low background activity for schools and low-power devices
runtime: local heritage database and offline media cache
African language resources, dictionaries and keyboards
reader, audio, language and museum surfaces
community knowledge spaces and sync-ready archives
Baobab module manifest through seven baobab
experience: Baobab Heritage, Sound, Story, Fashion, Food, Wisdom and Market modules
organic warm visual rhythm inspired by earth, textile, fire, wind and tree shade
calm media, reading and oral-tradition surfaces
intelligence: story narration and oral knowledge support
African language tutoring and translation guidance
offline learning recommendations and provenance-aware cultural explanations

anti_nuisance: no general document/OCR workflow
no GIS/travel stack
no dev toolchain
no docker
no security toolkit
no cloud services
no gaming runtime

independence.composition_policy: must stay culture-first; dev, cloud, security or gaming tools are added only by explicit composition

forge.title: Forge DevOps
forge.role: Developer and cloud deployment mini OS
forge.domain: software engineering, local services and cloud deployment
forge.purpose: A developer and deployment SevenOS environment for code, SDKs, containers, local services, self-hosting, cloud operations, builds, logs and release workflows.

kernel: stable service throughput and network QoS
runtime: editors, IDE helpers and technical documentation
Node, Python, Rust, Go and system toolchains
Git workflows, CI helpers and local services
Podman/Docker, Caddy, SSH, deploy tools and endpoint logs
experience: developer Waybar signals with network/deploy awareness
intelligence: code assistant and build error explanation
deployment analysis, health checks and rollback suggestions
service repair and release readiness guidance

anti_nuisance: no public service exposure without confirmation
no security scans unless Shield is composed
no media render stack unless Studio is composed
no gaming runtime unless Pulse is composed
cloud daemons stay explicit and visible

independence.composition_policy: Forge owns development and deployment; Shield can add audit, Studio can add media pipelines, Pulse can add performance, without changing Forge identity.

shield.title: Shield Cybersecurity
shield.purpose: A dynamic cybersecurity mini OS for authorized audit, defensive monitoring, OSINT, forensics, DevSecOps, malware triage, isolated lab work and Kali/BlackArch-compatible tool access.

runtime: persona engine for safe/research/lab/osint/forensics/malware/devsecops/redteam/blueteam modes
forensics, network, web, reversing and sandbox tools
ephemeral and persistent Shield sessions
scope, evidence, capture and report helpers
experience: VPN, isolation, scope and session signals

anti_nuisance: no intrusive scans without active scope and confirmation
unknown samples default to offline or ephemeral labs
no dev containers unless Forge is composed
no cloud daemons unless Forge DevOps is composed
no red-team behavior outside explicit authorization
intrusive contexts require an active Shield scope
network posture is advisory unless the user applies elevated firewall/VPN policy
evidence registration hashes originals without modifying them
prefer tool source resolution over installing huge catalogs by default
Kali compatibility runs in an isolated container instead of changing the host root
BlackArch remains opt-in and reviewed before repository activation

personas.safe: Defensive posture and local audit baseline
personas.redteam: Authorized adversary emulation with active scope

session_modes.persistent: keeps reports, scope and evidence across sessions
session_modes.ephemeral: cleans disposable workspace data on closure via seven shield cleanup

toolchain_sources.arch: official repositories first for stable baseline tools

bundles.malware: offline sample triage and sandbox support

studio.title: Studio Creator
studio.purpose: A creator-focused SevenOS environment for logos, design, video, audio, 3D, capture, streaming and asset production.

runtime: image and vector tools
video and audio tools
3D and capture tools
asset conversion helpers

anti_nuisance: no security scans during render unless confirmed
no dev services unless Forge is composed
no gaming overlays unless Pulse is composed

atlas.title: Atlas Explorer
atlas.role: Documents, maps, OCR and research navigation mini OS
atlas.domain: exploration, documents, maps, research and personal knowledge
atlas.purpose: A SevenOS mini OS for exploring the world, organizing documents, reading maps, scanning/OCR, managing PDFs, planning trips, collecting references and turning scattered information into navigable knowledge. Atlas does not own cultural identity packs or oral heritage workflows; Baobab owns those.

kernel: quiet foreground scheduling for reading and research
responsive search and indexing without noisy background work
runtime: PDF, ebook, office, scan, map and archive tools
OCR, metadata, annotation, tagging and document conversion helpers
local knowledge folders, research notes and reference collections
offline-first map and travel utilities when available
experience: Prism map of places, documents and collections
document preview, citation and location-aware organization
intelligence: local knowledge retrieval and citation-aware assistance
Atlas route guidance between places, files and notes

anti_nuisance: no cultural identity packs unless Baobab is composed
no language tutoring/oral heritage workflow unless Baobab is composed
no dev daemons unless Forge is composed
no security scans unless Shield is composed
no render stack unless Studio is composed
no gaming overlays unless Pulse is composed
no external sync without explicit confirmation

independence.composition_policy: Atlas owns exploration, documents and knowledge navigation; it can borrow Forge automation, Studio media or Baobab heritage only by explicit composition.

pulse.title: Pulse Gaming
pulse.purpose: A gaming-focused SevenOS environment optimized for Linux games, Proton, low latency, frame pacing, controllers and overlays.

runtime: Steam, Lutris and Proton helpers
GameMode
MangoHud and overlays
controller support
host GPU driver guidance
private Pulse rootfs package installs

anti_nuisance: no dev daemons
no background scans
no cloud services
no foreign OS VM dependency

horizon.title: Horizon Cloud
horizon.reason: Development and deployment share the same workflow surface in SevenOS; Forge DevOps now owns code, services, containers and cloud deployment.
